summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 0DTE Trading Range Calculator Fence Betting System. All new fence betting features working perfectly with 97.4% backend success and 100% frontend success.

minor_issues.issue: Direction field validation accepts invalid values like 'sideways'
minor_issues.impact: Low - doesn't break functionality, just allows invalid direction strings

passed_tests: Paper trading account creation and management
Account reset to $10,000 starting balance
BET INSIDE button places inside bets with correct API calls
BET OUTSIDE button places outside bets with correct API calls
Fence width selector (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x, 2x) adjusts fence bands
Trade amount input accepts custom bet amounts
Scoreboard displays bankroll, P&L, wins, losses, win rate
Open bets display shows current bets with WINNING/LOSING status
Close bet (X button) closes trades and calculates correct P&L
Win = +90% profit, Lose = -100% of bet amount logic working
Reset button resets bankroll and clears all statistics
Real-time fence band calculation with multipliers
Frontend-backend integration for all fence betting operations
Toast notifications for successful bet placements
Ticker switching works with fence betting (SPY, QQQ tested)
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
Fence betting explanation text displays correctly
Bankroll updates in real-time after each bet/close/reset
Open trades show correct fence ranges and current status
All fence betting APIs return correct status codes and data
